title: WV10 0DX, Libatt Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BP3949QN/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Libatt Recycling Ltd Installation name: Wolverhampton Waste Facility Permit number: EPR/BP3949QN/V003  "
